mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${tableName} ( id, tenant_id, api_config_id, api_code, call_direction, caller_ip, trace_id, task_id, invoke_mode, request_data, raw_request_data, assembled_request_data, response_data, response_code, call_status, result_type, error_message, cost_time_ms, call_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES ( #{log.id}, #{log.tenantId}, #{log.apiConfigId}, #{log.apiCode}, #{log.callDirection}, #{log.callerIp}, #{log.traceId}, #{log.taskId}, #{log.invokeMode}, #{log.requestData}, #{log.rawRequestData}, #{log.assembledRequestData}, #{log.responseData}, #{log.responseCode}, #{log.callStatus}, #{log.resultType}, #{log.errorMessage}, #{log.costTimeMs}, #{log.callTime}, #{log.createTime}, #{log.createBy}, #{log.updateTime}, #{log.updateBy} )
